mnemonics: Wetlands WADE: Water purification, Aquifer recharge, Diversity of life, Erosion control
keyPoints: Wetlands act as natural water filters, removing pollutants.
They serve as crucial habitats for a vast array of plant and animal species.
Wetlands are vital for flood control, absorbing and slowly releasing excess rainwater.
commonMistakes: Assuming all wetlands are swamps (they also include marshes, bogs, and fens).
Underestimating their economic value and viewing them solely as wasteland.
